name: Marshall Plan
descriptionTemplate: When commanding land units, X% of the economy spent during the turn will be regained in the next turn (up to 1200). When commanding land units, for each enemy eliminated within 3 hexes of the commanding units, you gain 40 Industry and 4 Technology (can be triggered up to 3 times per turn).

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding land units, 8% of the economy spent during the turn will be regained in the next turn (up to 1200). When commanding land units, for each enemy eliminated within 3 hexes of the commanding units, you gain 40 Industry and 4 Technology (can be triggered up to 3 times per turn).
progression.renderedDescFr: When commanding land unités, 8% of the economy spent during the tour will be regained in the next tour (up to 1200). When commanding land unités, for each ennemi eliminated dans un rayon de 3 hex of the commanding unités, you gain 40 Industry and 4 Technology (can be triggered up to 3 times par tour).
